message: test: isolate doctor switch shell profiles

files.patch:

       cat "$install_log"
       exit 1
     fi
+    rm -f "$HOME/.zshrc" "$HOME/.bashrc" "$HOME/.bash_profile"
+    rm -rf "$HOME/.config/fish" "$HOME/.config/powershell"
 
     unit_path="$HOME/.config/systemd/user/openclaw-gateway.service"
     if [ ! -f "$unit_path" ]; then
